project.name: mOhiOm
project.description: AI-powered comic generation app with a Next.js 14 frontend and FastAPI backend, using Google Gemini for story analysis, character design, panel script generation, and image generation.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Application configuration using Pydantic Settings, loads environment variables for database, JWT, Gemini API, CORS, and OAuth settings.

nodes.name: crud.py
nodes.summary: Data access layer providing ItemRepository and UserRepository classes for MongoDB CRUD operations.

nodes.name: database.py
nodes.summary: MongoDB connection management using PyMongo, provides get_db() dependency for FastAPI routes.

nodes.name: emailer.py
nodes.summary: Email delivery service using SMTP for sending password reset emails.

nodes.name: lifespan.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI lifespan context manager handling application startup and shutdown hooks.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application entry point that registers all routers and configures CORS middleware.

nodes.name: rate_limit.py
nodes.summary: Per-user async sliding-window rate limiter for Gemini API requests, configurable via environment variables.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Router package initializer that aggregates all route modules.

nodes.name: auth.py
nodes.summary: Authentication router handling user registration, login, JWT tokens, OAuth (Google/GitHub), and password reset flows.

nodes.name: gemini.py
nodes.summary: Gemini AI router providing SSE streaming endpoints for story analysis, character design, panel scripts, and image generation across the comic creation pipeline.

nodes.name: items.py
nodes.summary: Generic items CRUD router for demo/testing purposes.

nodes.name: projects.py
nodes.summary: Projects router implementing comic project CRUD and nested character management (create, update, delete characters within projects).

nodes.name: text_to_comic.py
nodes.summary: Background job router for text-to-comic pipeline execution using async task management.

nodes.name: schemas.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic schema definitions for all request/response models including users, items, projects, and characters.

nodes.name: security.py
nodes.summary: JWT token creation and verification utilities using python-jose.

nodes.name: services.py
nodes.summary: Core LLM integration service (GeminiService) implementing all AI interactions: story analysis, character design, panel script generation, and image generation via Google Gemini API. Supports both Gemini and Nine Router LLM backends.

nodes.name: auth_smoke.py
nodes.summary: Smoke test script for authentication endpoints covering registration, login, and token validation.

nodes.name: text_to_comic_pipeline.py
nodes.summary: Standalone text-to-comic pipeline script orchestrating the full AI-driven comic generation workflow from story input to panel images.

layers.name: Backend API Layer
layers.description: FastAPI application entry point and route handlers for auth, Gemini AI, comics, projects, and items endpoints.

layers.name: Backend Service Layer
layers.description: Core business logic including the Gemini AI service, CRUD operations, email delivery, rate limiting, security, and the text-to-comic pipeline.

layers.name: Backend Data & Config Layer
layers.description: Pydantic schemas, MongoDB connection, application configuration, database initialization scripts, and Python package initializers.

layers.name: Frontend Core Layer
layers.description: React context providers (AuthContext, ComicGenerationContext), the central API service client, custom hooks, and utility functions.

layers.name: Frontend Studio UI Layer
layers.description: Comic creation wizard components including the multi-step generator (Steps 0-4), story setup form, character management modals, and studio layout components.

layers.name: Frontend Pages & Auth Layer
layers.description: Next.js App Router pages for authentication flows (login, register, OAuth callback, password reset), admin dashboard, gallery, pricing, and API routes.

layers.name: Frontend Config & Assets Layer
layers.description: Next.js, Tailwind, PostCSS, and TypeScript configuration files, global CSS styles, and static asset placeholders.

layers.name: Infrastructure & DevOps Layer
layers.description: Docker Compose orchestration, Dockerfiles, Claude Code settings, GitHub agents, and development tooling configuration.

layers.name: Documentation Layer
layers.description: Project documentation including setup guides, architecture references, Gemini integration docs, quick-start guides, and the session log.

layers.name: Reference UI Prototype Layer
layers.description: Standalone Vite-based React prototype serving as a UI design reference for the comic studio pages, including HTML mockups of each screen.

layers.name: Tests & Scripts Layer
layers.description: Integration tests for Gemini and the text-to-comic pipeline, authentication smoke tests, and setup scripts (PowerShell/batch).

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the mOhiOm project: an AI-powered comic generation app with a Next.js frontend and FastAPI backend. The docker-compose.yml shows how the three services (frontend, backend, MongoDB) fit together.

tour.title: Backend Entry Point & Configuration
tour.description: The FastAPI app starts in backend/app/main.py, which registers all routers and configures CORS. Configuration is centralized in config.py using Pydantic Settings, loading all environment variables (database, JWT, Gemini API, OAuth).

tour.title: Backend Data Models & Database
tour.description: Pydantic schemas in schemas.py define all API request/response shapes. database.py provides the MongoDB connection via PyMongo. crud.py offers ItemRepository and UserRepository for database operations.

tour.title: Authentication & Security
tour.description: The auth router handles registration, login, JWT tokens, and OAuth flows (Google/GitHub). security.py manages JWT creation and verification. The rate_limit.py module protects the AI endpoints with per-user throttling.

tour.title: Core AI Service (Gemini)
tour.description: services.py (2072 lines) is the heart of the AI integration — GeminiService implements story analysis, character design, panel script generation, and image generation via Google Gemini. routers/gemini.py exposes these as SSE streaming endpoints. This is where the magic happens.

tour.title: Projects & Character API
tour.description: routers/projects.py handles comic project CRUD and nested character management (create, update, delete character references within a project). This was recently added to support the character library feature.

tour.title: Frontend API Client
tour.description: frontend/src/services/api.ts (893 lines) is the central frontend infrastructure — a typed Axios client that auto-injects X-User-Id, and exports authApi, geminiApi, comicApi, and projectsApi namespaces. It also provides SSE streaming helpers using fetch() + AbortController for real-time AI output.

tour.title: Authentication Context & App Shell
tour.description: AuthContext.tsx provides the React authentication state (current user, login/logout) wrapping the entire app via layout.tsx. AuthShell.tsx provides the consistent layout for auth pages.

tour.title: Comic Generation Context (Core Workflow)
tour.description: ComicGenerationContext.tsx (2434 lines) is the most important file in the frontend — it owns the entire 5-step comic creation workflow. It manages all state for story setup → AI analysis → character design → panel script → image generation, handling SSE streaming, localStorage persistence, and cloud project saves.

tour.title: Comic Studio Wizard UI
tour.description: TextToComicGenerator.tsx is the wizard container that wraps everything in ComicGenerationProvider and routes between the 5 step components. Each step (Step1Analysis through Step4Generation) displays one phase of the comic creation pipeline.

tour.title: Story Setup Form (Step 0)
tour.description: The story setup form (Step1.tsx in story-setup/) is a complex form with autosave, draft recovery, and file upload. Custom hooks (useAutosave, useDraftRecovery, useFileUpload, useFormValidation) handle the form's state. Step0Setup.tsx bridges this to the wizard container.

tour.title: Character Management
tour.description: CreateCharacterModal.tsx allows creating AI characters via image upload or description. CharacterLibraryModal.tsx enables importing characters from other projects. These connect to the projectsApi to persist character data.

tour.title: Reference UI Prototype
tour.description: The Reference/ directory contains a standalone Vite+React app serving as the UI design prototype. It shows the intended layout and UX for all studio screens before they were implemented in the main Next.js app.

tour.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
tour.description: Docker Compose orchestrates the full stack (frontend port 3000, backend port 8000, MongoDB port 27017). Backend and frontend each have their own Dockerfile. The database/ directory contains MongoDB initialization scripts.
